creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Cannot load firmware on main git c74ab5ce6f25, amd64.
Hardware probe is at [1].

[1] http://bsd-hardware.info/?probe=676f16ac86

Downloaded linux firmware from kernel.org and checked diff against /usr/src/sys/dev/iwlwififw/iwlwifi-9000-pu-b0-jf-b0-46.ucode shows no difference.

Error messages are as below.

Intel(R) Wireless WiFi based driver for FreeBSD
